SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BRICE BEN HOBBS, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF REBECCA B. WAUGH, ONLY. NO APPEARANCES BY (3) DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOBBS, BRICE BEN WANGH, REBECCA BELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, TIMOTHY M HIKICHI, SAKURA $5,063.00 PRINCIPAL, $137.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,200.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST OOHLIVE, LLC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
